daily_summary.headline: Artemis II: A Historic Crewed Lunar Flyby

top_events.title: SLS Block 1 | Artemis II
top_events.description: First crewed mission of the Artemis program, sending astronauts on a lunar flyby.
top_events.action: Watch live broadcast and follow mission updates

top_events.title: Tianlong-3 | Demo Flight
top_events.description: First test launch of Space Pioneer’s Tianlong-3 rocket.
top_events.action: Monitor for updates on maiden flight success

top_events.title: Soyuz 2.1a/Fregat-M | Meridian-M No.21L
top_events.description: Launch of a communications satellite for military and civilian use.

alerts.title: Artemis II Launch Alert
alerts.message: The Artemis II mission is set to launch, marking the first crewed lunar flyby in 50 years. This historic event is part of NASA's Artemis program.
alerts.action_required: Watch the live broadcast and follow mission updates.
